'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"\/sitemap-0.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=4dotnohfFizXNx_ftdq9FxOe.YtggXKJjHsfqycYxzE-1771472195-1.0.1.1-H0KI9Gr3eJjp5ZCsofIdbhDjYgurO2cwupiYOf3LssI"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
